hada53ae6g7fbeg4b0eg861ag2df99f604c3c: So Wyll, what was the Blade of Frontiers' toughest kill?
h8a7595ecg72d4g4732gbcaeg9b8728cb685e: Ah - it was a great scrap. A hungry minotaur with a hankering for human flesh.
h54aac177gd316g4d7eg9cf8gc25ec2e526d6: An axe-bearing mountain of fur, she was. Gave me a nasty scar.
h8783d97dg24b5g4eb6g96f2g9edaa24bf924: Hm, you'll have to show it to me sometime.
